channel.title: Controller CRDs on Open Component Model
channel.description: Recent content in Controller CRDs on Open Component Model

item.title: Component
item.description: A Component represents an OCM component version to be tracked by the controller. It references a Repository object and specifies a semantic version constraint to select which component version to reconcile.

item.title: Repository
item.description: A Repository represents an OCM repository (for example, an OCI registry) that contains component versions. The controller validates the repository at the configured interval and propagates OCM configuration.

item.title: Resource
item.description: A Resource represents a specific OCM resource (artifact) within a component version. It references a Component object and identifies the desired resource by name and identity.

item.title: Deployer
item.description: A Deployer is a cluster-scoped resource that deploys OCM resources into the cluster. It references a Resource containing a ResourceGroupDefinition and manages the lifecycle of the deployed Kubernetes objects.
